acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent mode to automatically switch between MS and MS/MS acquisition.
cleavage agent: the proteins were digested with 1 μg trypsin (Promega, sequencing grade) overnight at 37 °C.
fragmentation method: to automatically switch between MS and MS/MS acquisition.
instrument: analyzed using an Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano-UHPLC system connected to a Q Exactive mass spectrometer.
ionization type: equipped with a nanoelectrospray ion source and loading capacity of 3.3 µg.
labeling: Proteins were quantified using the MaxLFQ (label-free quantification) algorithm.
